passives.name: Spellblade
passives.effects: After using an [[champion ability|ability]], your next basic attack within 10 seconds deals {{as|180% '''base''' AD}} {{as|(+ {{rd|4%|2%}} of target's '''maximum''' health)}} as {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} [[on-hit]], for a '''minimum''' of {{as|180% '''base''' AD}}. If the target is a champion, {{tip|heal}} for{{ft|{{as|{{ap|180*0.55}}% '''base''' AD}} {{as|(+ {{rd|{{ap|4*0.55}}%|{{ap|2*0.55}}%}} of target's '''maximum''' health)|health}}|55% of the damage value}}({{fd|1.5}} second cooldown, starts after using the empowered attack).

effects_structured.raw: After using an [[champion ability ability]], your next basic attack within 10 seconds deals {{as 180% '''base''' AD}} {{as (+ {{rd 4% 2%}} of target's '''maximum''' health)}} as {{as '''bonus''' physical damage}} [[on-hit]], for a '''minimum''' of {{as 180% '''base''' AD}}

If the target is a champion, {{tip heal}} for{{ft {{as {{ap 180*0.55}}% '''base''' AD}} {{as (+ {{rd {{ap 4*0.55}}% {{ap 2*0.55}}%}} of target's '''maximum''' health) health}} 55% of the damage value}}({{fd 1.5}} second cooldown, starts after using the empowered attack).

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Verified page-level Spellblade semantics: empowered attack window is 10 seconds, damage branch applies 180% base AD plus 4%/2% target max health (melee/ranged) with a minimum floor at 180% base AD.
Heal branch is champion-only and uses 55% of Spellblade damage value; internal cooldown is 1.5 seconds and starts after the empowered attack is consumed.
Mode-availability note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped (Prismatic Anvil source); treat non-Arena availability as mode-gated.

Economy representation note: Tier-1 datasets expose distributed-item gold fields (total 1000 / sell 400); these values are retained for reconciliation while acquisition remains Prismatic Item Anvil/mode-scoped rather than standard shop purchase.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
